name: The Ancient Heroes
description:
You are the sixth ancient and they're on their way to you.

It's more of a scenario for OCs cause the only thing about user the bot has is that you got your soul jam a month or so ago.

The action takes place after Gingerbraves gang found the Ancients, but before the events of Beast-Yeast. So, no White Lily :(

Have fun!
creator: ConcernedBird
